name: Qwilr
description: An Australian-founded proposal and sales document platform that creates beautiful, interactive web-based proposals instead of static PDFs. Qwilr proposals look like modern web pages with embedded video, interactive pricing, and analytics.
whyUseIt: Qwilr proposals stand out because they're interactive. Instead of a static PDF, the buyer gets a branded web page with embedded videos, interactive pricing calculators, and e-signature built in. The analytics show you exactly what the buyer engaged with. Founded in Sydney, Qwilr is a popular choice for Australian sales teams who want proposals that feel modern and premium.
aiCapabilities: Qwilr AI assists with content generation for proposal sections, suggests design improvements, and auto-populates proposal fields from CRM data integration.
funnelPosition: Bottom of funnel — proposal creation, interactive quoting, and e-signatures
sellerWorkflow: AEs build proposals using Qwilr's drag-and-drop editor with pre-built blocks for case studies, pricing, and team introductions. Proposals are shared as URLs. The buyer interacts with pricing options, watches embedded videos, and signs — all in one place. AEs monitor analytics to see engagement.
managerExpects: Proposals are visually professional and on-brand. Interactive pricing is used where appropriate. Analytics are monitored to time follow-ups based on buyer engagement.
demoDescription: Build an interactive proposal with a pricing calculator, embed a Loom video walkthrough, add a case study block, publish the page, and check analytics showing buyer engagement.

vocabulary.definition: A pricing table where the buyer can select options and see the total update in real-time — making it easy to compare packages.
Data showing how many times the proposal was viewed, time spent on each section, and which pricing option was most engaged with.

beginnerMistakes: Overdesigning proposals — keep them focused on the buyer's pain and your solution, not visual flash
Not embedding a personal video — Qwilr proposals with a Loom walkthrough have significantly higher engagement
Ignoring page analytics — they tell you exactly what the buyer cares about most
